metadata.name: SpectraCQ
metadata.description: 137 competency questions for the SPECTRA ontology, with executable Cypher.

cqs.question_en: List the TDocs presented at meeting RAN1#120 that are linked to Work Item NR_eMIMO-Core (MIMO meeting preparation).
List the TDocs presented at meeting RAN1#121 under agenda items beginning with 9.2 (AI/ML for NR session preparation).
List the TDocs submitted at meeting RAN1#120 by CompanyA (competitor-contribution trend analysis).
List recently submitted TDocs targeting Release 18 (per-release contribution status).
List the TDocs at meeting RAN1#121 with status approved or agreed.
Return the decision status of TDoc R1-2599001 (single-TDoc status lookup).
Return the purpose (For field, e.g., Discussion/Approval/Agreement) of TDoc R1-2599001.
Return the contact (submitter contact) of TDoc R1-2599001.
List the full agenda of meeting RAN1#120 with item descriptions (meeting preparation).
Return the revision history (predecessor/successor versions) of TDoc R1-2599001 (revision-lineage tracing).
For outgoing LS R1-2599567, return its origin (originatedFrom) and destination (sentTo) Working Groups (LS-path tracing).
Identify which incoming LS the TDoc R1-2599004 is replying to (replyTo lookup).
List the CRs that modify TS 38.214, with each CR's status (TS 38.214 amendment status).
Return the CR category (F/A/B/C/D) and the affected clauses for CR R1-2599971.
List the TDocs at meeting RAN1#120 that were postponed to the next meeting (open-issue tracking).
List incoming LSes received at RAN1#120 with their associated agenda items (cross-WG-request review).
List the TDocs submitted by CompanyE under Work Item NR_MIMO_evo_DL_UL-Core.
List TDocs from other companies on agenda item 8.1 (NR Coverage Enhancement) at meeting RAN1#120 (competitor contribution review).
Return the top-10 companies by contribution count to Work Item NR_unlic-Core (competitive landscape per technology area).
Return the count and ratio of TDocs submitted by CompanyD that reached approved/agreed status (company-level outcome analysis).
List TDocs from other companies that share the same agenda item with TDoc R1-2599001 (competing-contribution review).
Return CompanyC's top-10 work items by contribution count (technology-leadership distribution).
List CompanyE's prior TDocs in Work Item NR_eMIMO-Core across past meetings (technology-history tracing).
Summarize CompanyB's TDoc outcomes at meeting RAN1#120 by status.
List TDocs at meeting RAN1#120 on agenda item 9.3 (NR duplex evolution) that remain not treated (open-issue review).
List the Agreements made at meeting RAN1#115 under agenda items beginning with 7.1 (NR MIMO outcome review).
Return the Agreements at meeting RAN1#100 on agenda item 5.1 (UL Tx switching technical decisions).
List the Conclusions recorded at the most recent meeting (RAN1#121) for open-issue review.
List the Working Assumptions of meeting RAN1#115 (revisitable agenda items).
List recent Agreements that contain FFS (For Further Study) markers (items needing additional review).
Return Agreements related to PDCCH blind decoding (PDCCH technical-decision tracing).
Return Agreements related to beam management (beam-management technical decisions).
List the TDocs referenced by Agreement AGR-100-6.1-001 (origin-document tracing for an approved CR).
Identify which Agreement TDoc R1-2599110 led to (TDoc-to-standard outcome tracing).
List Agreements at meeting RAN1#115 that approved CRs (spec-change decision tracing).
Return the top-10 agenda items by Resolution count (hotspot-topic identification).
List Resolutions related to TS 38.211 amendments (38.211 revision history).
List TDocs from CompanyA that led to Agreements (company-level standard-contribution tracing).
Return CompanyE's Agreement-contributing TDoc count and ratio (standard-contribution analysis).
Return the top-10 companies by Resolution contributions in agenda 7.1 (NR MIMO).
Return CompanyD's 10 most recent Agreement-participating TDocs.
Compare CompanyB's and CompanyC's Resolution contributions.
List CompanyF's TDocs that reached approved status.
Return the top-5 companies by FL Summary authorship in agenda 7.1 (NR MIMO) — technology-leadership analysis.
List the agenda items in which CompanyA authored an FL Summary.
Return the top-10 companies by FL Summary count (technology-leadership ranking).
Return the chronological progression of Agreements about CSI-RS (technology-evolution tracing).
List Agreements about HARQ feedback (HARQ technical decisions).
List Agreements about SRS configuration (SRS standardization decisions).
List Agreements about DCI format (DCI-format standardization).
List Agreements about PUSCH repetition (PUSCH-repetition technical decisions).
Return the Agreement count per meeting from RAN1#100 to RAN1#121 (standardization-activity trend).
List Agreements about MIMO codebook.
List Agreements about BWP switching.
List Agreements about slot aggregation.
List Agreements about UCI multiplexing.
List Agreements about DMRS pattern (DMRS-pattern standardization).
List Agreements about SSB burst set.
List Agreements about PUCCH resource.
Return the top-level table of contents of TS 38.214 (locating DL-scheduling content).
Return the immediate sub-sections of TS 38.214 §5.1 (PDSCH-procedure implementation reference).
Return the breadcrumb (path-to-root) of TS 38.214 §5.1.3.2.
Return the per-level section count of TS 38.213 (structural-complexity profile).
Return the section in TS 38.213 with the most embedded tables (parameter-dense implementation hotspot).
List all tables defined in TS 38.214 (parameter-table reference for implementation).
List sections with 'PDSCH' in the title across all TSes.
Compare the section/table/figure counts across the 8 TSes (TS-complexity comparison).
Return the cross-references for TS 38.214 §5.1 (which sections must be co-read during implementation).
Return the sections that reference TS 38.211 §5.2.1 (Pseudo-random sequence) — base-algorithm dependents.
Return the top-15 most-referenced sections across all 8 TSes.
Return mutually-referencing section pairs in TS 38.213 (closely-coupled procedures).
Compare cross-reference density per TS (inter-section-reference tightness).
Return bidirectional reference pairs between sections (circular-dependency check).
Return the 2-hop dependencies of TS 38.214 §5.1 (transitive references).
Return the total CR count for TS 38.214 (amendment activity).
Return the 20 most recent CRs that modify TS 38.213.
Return CRs whose clausesAffected includes TS 38.214 §5.1 (impact on a specific section).
Compare CR counts across the 8 TSes (where standardization is most active).
List CRs submitted by CompanyD against TS 38.214 (company-domain contribution).
Return CRs that modify 5+ sections in a single change (large-scope CRs).
Return per-meeting CR-submission trend for TS 38.213 (standardization-activity dynamics).
Return the count of Agreements that approved CRs modifying TS 38.214 (decision-making activity).
Return the 10 most recent Agreements affecting TS 38.213.
Summarize Agreement counts per TS (where consensus is most active).
Return Agreements affecting TS 38.213 that contain TBD markers (unresolved technical issues).
Return Agreements that simultaneously reference CRs across multiple TSes (cross-TS consensus).
Return Resolutions on TS 38.213 mentioning HARQ (HARQ-related decision tracing).
Return sections whose titles contain 'antenna' (antenna-port spec locations).
List CSI-related tables (parameter tables for CSI reporting).
Return sections containing 'HARQ' across TSes (HARQ-process implementation scope).
Return PDCCH-related sections and tables (control-channel implementation scope).
Return PUSCH-related sections and tables (uplink-data-channel implementation scope).
Return SRS-related sections and tables (Sounding Reference Signal scope).
Return sections containing measurement or reporting keywords (measurement-reporting scope).
Return the top-5 TSes by CR count and their section counts (complexity vs amendment frequency).
Return per-company CR submission counts across all 8 TSes (top contributors).
Return the top-10 most-referenced sections and their CR-modification count (stability assessment).
Return the top-10 companies that submitted CRs against TS 38.214 (technical-leadership analysis).
Compare CR counts vs Agreement counts per TS (change-vs-consensus ratio).
Return sections with 5+ embedded tables (parameter-dense implementation hotspots).
Return the top-10 sections with both many sub-sections and tables (high-complexity areas).
Return a Neo4j graph summary (node and relationship counts by type).
Return TSes affected by CRs from Work Item NR_newRAT-Core (work-item portfolio analysis).
Return TSes whose Resolutions affected CRs from Work Item NR_FeMIMO-Core (work-item-to-standard tracing).
Return the reason-for-change of CR R1-2599971 (which affects 5 specs for the LP-WUS/WUR adoption).
Return the summary-of-change of CR R1-2599685 (Rel-19 UL Tx switching 3Tx UE scenario).
Return the consequences-if-not-approved for CRs in Work Item NR_LPWUS-Core (Rel-19 LP-WUS/WUR).
Return the 5 specs affected by CR R1-2599971 along with each impact-relation type (Core/Test/OM).
Return the spec most often subject to cross-spec impact from CRs that modify TS 38.214, with CR counts.
Return the total count and representative numbers of CRs that mark TS 38.214 as a cross-spec impact target.
Return the top-10 CRs by cross-spec impact span and the affected-spec list per CR.
Return CRs in CRPack RP-252634 (latest RAN#109) and each CR's change summary.
Return the CR Packs that bundle CRs from Work Item NR_newRAT-Core toward TSG approval.
Return CR Packs submitted at RAN#109 with the CR count per pack.
Return change-reason patterns for recent CRs modifying TS 38.214 §5.1.5 (PDSCH MIMO, most-modified).
Return the change-reason and change-summary of CRs approved by Resolution AGR-115-7.1-004.
Return the full list of TS sections modified by CRs from Work Item NR_MIMO_evo_DL_UL-Core, with each change reason.
Return the cross-spec impact distribution of recent CompanyE-submitted CRs (most-cross-spec company, latest first).
Return aggregated change summaries for CRs agreed at RAN1#121 (the most-recent meeting with 18 CRs carrying summaryOfChange).
Return the scope and conclusions of TR 38.769 (Ambient IoT for NR) — required for new IoT product planning.
Return the trStatus and conclusions of TR 38.889 (NR-U) to assess standardization readiness.
List TRs currently in Draft status to forecast upcoming standard impact.
Return the scope and conclusions of TR 38.885 (V2X Sidelink) — automotive-communications product planning.
Did TR 38.769 (Ambient IoT) generate a new TS? If so, which TS and impact type?
Which new sections did TR 38.889 (NR-U) add to TS 38.211--38.214 (PHY-team reference)?
Return all TRs that affected TS 38.211 with their impact types (TS 38.211 revision history).
Identify which TR study the TS 38.211 §16 (NR-U physical-layer procedures) section originated from.
List TRs that produced an entirely new TS (NewTS impact type) with the new TS number.
Which TS sections did TR 38.875 (RedCap) impact (low-power-IoT team reference)?
Which new sections did TR 38.869 (LP-WUS) add to TS 38.211 and 38.213 (UE power-saving feature implementation)?
Return TR 38.824 (URLLC) impacts on TS 38.211 and 38.214 with details (low-latency industrial communications).
List Rel-18-target TRs and each TR's impact types on TSes.
Return the trStatus and scope of TR 38.760-1 (6G Radio) — next-generation roadmap review.
Return the conclusions and TS-impact status of TR 38.808 (52.6 GHz--71 GHz) — mmWave product planning.
Return TRs that TR 38.859 (Ambient IoT for NR) references (related-research overview).
Return TRs that reference TR 38.802 (RedCap) — reverse reference, follow-up research tracking.
Return the top-5 most-referenced TRs (core-foundation research identification).
